hero.title: Hicare — Innovative Connected Care Management Service
hero.subtitle: Connecting providers and patients through intelligent monitoring, seamless logistics, and human-centric technology.

bridge.title: Bridging the Gap
bridge.desc: We simplify complex RPM workflows into a single, intuitive platform that monitors, alerts, and manages patient data in real-time with 120+ compatible medical devices.

insights.title: Actionable Insights
insights.desc: Transform raw data into clinical decisions with AI-powered automated reporting and Medicare billing integration.

clinical.title: Clinical Support
clinical.desc: Dedicated specialists ready to assist your team in patient onboarding, device logistics, and 24/7 technical support.

global.title: Global Reach, Local Touch
global.desc: Serving 40+ hospitals across California with device logistics, patient education, and localized support. Expanding to the East Coast, Italy, and France.

providers.label: For Providers
providers.title: Scale Your Practice Efficiency
providers.desc: Reduce administrative burden with automated CPT coding, AI-generated reports, and seamless Medicare RPM/CCM reimbursement tracking. Monitor thousands of patients with the same overhead as a dozen.

patients.label: For Patients
patients.title: Care That Follows You Home
patients.desc: Receive Bluetooth-enabled devices that work right out of the box. Stay connected to your clinical team with voice-guided measurements and an elder-friendly mobile app.

steps.title: How It Works
steps.subtitle: Five simple steps to transform your remote patient monitoring workflow.

s1.title: Sign Up
s1.desc: Onboard your clinic and staff in minutes via our web portal.

s2.title: Enroll Patients
s2.desc: Select eligible patients and assign monitoring protocols.

s3.title: Ship Devices
s3.desc: We handle logistics, device setup, and initial patient education.

s4.title: Monitor Patients
s4.desc: Receive real-time data and smart alerts on your dashboard.

s5.title: Get Reimbursed
s5.desc: Generate monthly Medicare billing reports with one click.

hero.title: Empowering US Value-Based Care.
hero.desc: HicareNet delivers end-to-end RPM and CCM solutions designed for the US healthcare market, supporting Medicare reimbursement, HIPAA compliance, and seamless EHR integration.

hub.title: Hicare Hub
hub.label: Central Gateway for RPM
hub.desc: A unified cloud platform connecting 120+ compatible medical devices to clinical workflows with real-time data, automated alerts, and intelligent reporting.

f1.title: HL7 & FHIR Ready
f1.desc: Seamless interoperability with major EHR systems through standardized healthcare data exchange protocols.

f2.title: AI-Powered Reports
f2.desc: Automated clinical documentation and CPT code generation for streamlined Medicare billing.

f3.title: Real-Time Alerts
f3.desc: Configurable threshold-based alerts for proactive patient monitoring and timely interventions.

mobile.title: Hicare M
mobile.label: Patient Mobile App
mobile.desc: An elder-friendly mobile application with voice-guided measurements, multi-language support, and automatic data sync to the clinical dashboard.

f1.title: Voice-Guided Measurements
f1.desc: Step-by-step audio instructions in multiple languages for easy device usage.

f2.title: Automatic Data Sync
f2.desc: Bluetooth-connected devices automatically transmit readings to the Hicare Hub.

f3.title: 7 Language Support
f3.desc: Available in English, Korean, Spanish, Chinese, Vietnamese, Tagalog, and Russian.

compliance.title: Built for Compliance
compliance.desc: Every layer of HicareNet is designed with security and regulatory compliance at its core.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Practice?
cta.desc: Schedule a personalized demo to see how HicareNet can streamline your RPM and CCM workflows.

hero.title: 20+ Years of Healthcare Innovation
hero.desc: Founded in 2020 with 20+ years of healthcare IT heritage from InSung Info, HicareNet is pioneering connected care technology from Seoul to California.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To bridge the gap between clinical expertise and patient daily life through innovative connected care technology, making quality healthcare accessible to everyone, everywhere.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: A world where every patient receives personalized, data-driven care regardless of location, and every provider has the tools to deliver it efficiently.

y2002.title: HicareNet Established
y2002.desc: Founded as an independent corporation, spinning off from InSung Info's healthcare division with 20+ years of technology heritage.

y2016.title: US Subsidiary Established
y2016.desc: Launched HicareNet Inc. in California to serve the US healthcare market with RPM and CCM solutions.

y2018.title: RPM/CCM Service Launch
y2018.desc: Launched RPM/CCM services in April 2023, onboarding 15 hospitals and 1,000 patients in California.

y2022.title: Rapid Growth & Global Expansion
y2022.desc: Scaled to 37 hospitals and 2,000+ patients. Achieved ISO 27701 certification, launched AI-powered clinical platform, and expanded to Italy and France.

y2024.title: 40+ Hospitals & 3,000+ Patients
y2024.desc: Reached 40 contracted hospitals, 3,000+ enrolled patients, and 300+ monthly claims across California.

team.title: Leadership
team.desc: Our executive team brings decades of combined experience in healthcare IT, clinical operations, and enterprise software.

cta.title: Join Us in Transforming Healthcare
cta.desc: Partner with HicareNet to bring connected care to your patients.

hero.title: Enterprise-Grade Security for Healthcare
hero.desc: HicareNet meets the highest standards of data protection and regulatory compliance.

hipaa.title: HIPAA Compliance
hipaa.desc: Full compliance with the Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act, including administrative, physical, and technical safeguards for Protected Health Information (PHI).

iso27001.title: ISO 27001
iso27001.desc: Information Security Management System (ISMS) certified, demonstrating our commitment to systematic security management.

iso27701.title: ISO 27701
iso27701.desc: Privacy Information Management System (PIMS) certified, extending our ISMS to include privacy-specific controls.

fda.title: 120+ Compatible Devices
fda.desc: HicareNet integrates with 120+ Bluetooth-enabled medical devices for comprehensive remote patient monitoring, including blood pressure monitors, glucose meters, pulse oximeters, weight scales, and thermometers.

encryption.title: End-to-End Encryption
encryption.desc: AES-256 encryption for data at rest and TLS 1.3 for data in transit.

access.title: Access Control
access.desc: Role-based access control (RBAC) with multi-factor authentication.

audit.title: Audit Logging
audit.desc: Comprehensive audit trails for all data access and system events.

backup.title: Data Backup
backup.desc: Automated daily backups with geographic redundancy and disaster recovery.

pen.title: Penetration Testing
pen.desc: Regular third-party penetration testing and vulnerability assessments.

training.title: Staff Training
training.desc: Mandatory annual security and HIPAA compliance training for all employees.

q1.q: How does HicareNet protect patient data?
q1.a: We employ end-to-end encryption, role-based access controls, regular security audits, and comply with HIPAA, ISO 27001, and ISO 27701 standards.

q2.a: Yes. HicareNet maintains full HIPAA compliance with administrative, physical, and technical safeguards. We sign Business Associate Agreements (BAAs) with all covered entities.

q3.a: HicareNet holds ISO 27001 (Information Security), ISO 27701 (Privacy Management), and maintains full HIPAA compliance for healthcare data protection.

q4.q: How often are security assessments conducted?
q4.a: We conduct quarterly internal audits, annual third-party penetration testing, and continuous automated vulnerability scanning.

cta.title: Questions About Our Security?
cta.desc: Our compliance team is ready to discuss your security requirements.

c6.desc: Understanding how FHIR standards enable interoperability between HicareNet and EHR systems.

q1.a: RPM uses connected medical devices to collect patient health data outside traditional clinical settings, enabling real-time monitoring and proactive care management.

q2.q: How does HicareNet support Medicare reimbursement?
q2.a: HicareNet automatically tracks qualifying patient interactions, generates CPT-coded billing reports, and provides documentation for RPM (99453-99458) and CCM (99490-99491) codes.

q3.q: What devices are compatible with HicareNet?
q3.a: HicareNet supports 120+ Bluetooth-enabled medical devices including blood pressure monitors, glucose meters, pulse oximeters, weight scales, and thermometers.

q4.a: Most practices are fully onboarded within 2-4 weeks, including staff training, device logistics setup, and patient enrollment.
